channel.title: Latest Posts in Software Engineering

item.title: A question of databases
item.description: I read quite a few posts in X recently, that were promoting single database applications. I am concered reading this,...

item.title: Is X a Growth Hack?
item.description: I've been active on X/Twitter again recently and the amount of people who promise growth is even higher than before. ...

item.title: Blogging Experience - Or why i built a blog from scratch
item.description: As you might have noticed, this is a static site for the most part, containing HTML, CSS and a tiny amount of javascr...
